title: canarium subtile
intro: Canarium subtile, also known as Canarium, is a species of plant that belongs to the family Burseraceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Canarium subtile include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and infections. The herbal preparations of Canarium subtile include tea, tincture, and oil, which can be used externally or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
